identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: Define your agent's name, description, and model.
identity.name: Name

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Extend your agent with tools, workflows, and other resources to enhance its abilities.

variables.title: Variables
variables.subtitlePrefix: Variables are dynamic values that change based on the context of each request. Use them in your agent's instructions with the

instructionBlocks.title: Instruction blocks
instructionBlocks.subtitle: Add instruction blocks to your agent.

validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be 100 characters or less
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be 500 characters or less
validation.semanticRecallRequiresConfig: Semantic recall requires both vector and embedder to be configured

tools.title: Tools
tools.lockedDesc: This code-defined agent has disabled tools editing from Studio. Update the agent definition in code to change its tools.
tools.descriptionsOnlyTitle: Tool membership is owned by code
tools.descriptionsOnlyDesc: This code-defined agent only allows editing tool descriptions from Studio. Update the agent definition in code to add or remove tools.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Select workflows this agent can trigger.

subAgents.title: Sub-Agents
subAgents.subtitle: Select sub-agents for this agent to delegate to.

scorers.title: Scorers
scorers.subtitle: Configure scorers for evaluating agent responses.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Give your agent specialized knowledge by using skills.
skills.emptyDesc: Create a skill to give your agent specialized knowledge.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: Configure memory settings for conversation persistence and semantic recall.
memory.notEnabledDesc: Enable memory to store conversation history, add semantic recall for relevant retrieval, or observational memory for long-term learning.
memory.messageHistoryDesc: Number of recent messages to include in context
memory.lastMessagesDesc: Number of recent messages to include in context
memory.vectorStoreDesc: Select a vector store for semantic search
memory.embedderModelDesc: Select an embedding model for semantic search
memory.readOnlyDesc: Memory is read-only (no new messages stored)
memory.observationalMemoryDesc: Automatically observe and reflect on conversations to build long-term memory
memory.providerDesc: Provider for the observer and reflector agents
memory.modelDesc: Model for the observer and reflector agents
memory.scopeDesc: Whether observations are scoped per thread or shared across all threads for a resource
memory.shareTokenBudgetDesc: Share token budget between observation and reflection
memory.observerProviderOverrideDesc: Override the default model provider for the observer
memory.observerModelOverrideDesc: Override the default model for the observer
memory.reflectorProviderOverrideDesc: Override the default model provider for the reflector
memory.reflectorModelOverrideDesc: Override the default model for the reflector
memory.messageTokensDesc: Token count of unobserved messages that triggers observation (default: 30000)
memory.maxTokensPerBatchDesc: Maximum tokens per batch when observing multiple threads (default: 10000)
memory.bufferTokensDesc: Token interval for async buffering (fraction of messageTokens or absolute count, empty to use default 0.2, set 0 to disable)
memory.observerBufferActivationDesc: Ratio (0-1) of buffered observations to activate (default: 0.8)
memory.reflectorBufferActivationDesc: Ratio (0-1) controlling when async reflection buffering starts
memory.observerBlockAfterDesc: Multiplier or absolute token count for synchronous blocking (default: 1.2)
memory.reflectorBlockAfterDesc: Multiplier or absolute token count for synchronous blocking (default: 1.2)
memory.observationTokensDesc: Token count of observations that triggers reflection (default: 40000)
